mapper.select: SELECT SUM(actual_price) monthIncome,COUNT(1) monthCount FROM app_substitute_driving_indent WHERE user_b_id = #{id} AND DATE_FORMAT(create_time,'%Y%m') = DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(),'%Y%m') and (indent_state = 6 or indent_state = 7)
SELECT SUM(actual_price) income,COUNT(1) count FROM app_substitute_driving_indent WHERE user_b_id = #{id} AND (indent_state = 6 or indent_state = 7)

SELECT a.user_id userId,a.user_b_id userBId,CONCAT('') cleanType, CONCAT('代驾') cleanName,CONCAT('') carName,a.substitute_driving_number cleanIndentNumber, a.actual_price amount,a.indent_state indentState,b.url imgUrl,CONCAT('1') isEvaluation, a.create_time createTime,CONCAT('6') resource,CONCAT('') rescueName,end_address currentPosition FROM app_substitute_driving_indent as a LEFT JOIN app_lable as b ON b.id = 19 WHERE user_b_id = #{id} AND a.indent_state <> 0
AND a.indent_state = 1
AND (a.indent_state = 2 or a.indent_state = 3 or a.indent_state = 4)
AND a.indent_state = 5
AND a.indent_state = 6
AND a.indent_state = 8
order by createTime DESC LIMIT #{pagesize},20
